name: parallax-section
description: Multi-layer parallax scrolling with Intersection Observer scroll-reveal animations. Configurable speed per section via data attributes. Mobile-disabled for performance.

data_attributes.data-parallax-speed: Float 0–1. How fast element moves relative to scroll. 0.3 = slow drift, 1 = normal speed. Applied to section background or direct element.
data_attributes.data-animate: fade-up | fade-in. Triggers reveal animation when element enters viewport via IntersectionObserver.

css_classes_added.is-visible: Added when animate element enters viewport, triggers CSS transition
css_classes_added.parallax-ready: Added to body when parallax is initialized

reduced_motion: Respects prefers-reduced-motion — elements appear immediately, no transforms

platform_notes.drupal: Add data attributes via field formatters or template overrides in .html.twig
platform_notes.wordpress: Add via add_filter('the_content') or block attributes in block.json
platform_notes.webflow: Use Custom Attributes panel in Designer for data-parallax-speed and data-animate
